# Copilot Instructions

- Keep exercises incremental and test-first.
- Prefer small, focused Java examples over large abstractions.
- When adding practice code, include a corresponding test in `src/test/java`.
- Keep comments short and useful.
- Preserve the learning-oriented structure of the workspace.
- Use the `materials` folder as the source of truth for university topics.
- When generating exercises from material, create one focused exercise per concept or subtopic.
- Keep generated exercises aligned with the current stage of study and the companion test failures.
